case_title: SENG, TINA VS COLDWELL BANKER et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SENG, TINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COLDWELL BANKER CURRAN, TIM THE JUDGMENT DETERMINES THE ISSUE RAISED IN THIS CASE BETWEEN THE PARTIES TO THIS ACTION ONLY, AND DOES NOT AFFECT ANY POTENTIAL CLAIMS PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST THE SELLERS OF THE SUBJECT PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COLDWELL BANKER CURRAN, TIM
PLTFF'S HUSBAND CAME W/AUTH.LETTER TO PICK UP EXHI BITS:NO EXHIBITS FOUND IN CABINETS(INCLUDING FOR BIG EXHIBITS);MELINDA GAVE COURT'S PHONE NO, AS HE
(CONT'D):AS HE CAN'T GIVE HIS OR HER(PLTFF)PHONE NO;C/O MELINDA"TO TRY TO FIND IF IT IS IN RM.506, C/O FANNY&SLAVIT(AS HE CLAIMED GIVEN TO THE JUDGE)
HUSBAND OF TINA SENG CAME WITH AUTHORIZATION TO GET EXHIBITS. EXHIBITS RETURNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,800.00 FILED BY SENG, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT COLDWELL BANKER CURRAN, TIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
